command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: Track Annunaki error monitor, ignore local Claude projects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
error_lines: BLOCKED: git commit missing `-c user.name=` flag. Charter § Commit Identity requires per-commit identity via -c flags. Example: git -c user.name="Kwame Asante" -c user.email="parametrization+Kwame.Asante@gmail.com" commit -m "..."
